name: Kbd
description: CSS-only keyboard key indicator. Apply class="sg-kbd" on native <kbd>.
whenToUse: To display keyboard shortcuts or key combinations in documentation and UI.
avoidWhen: For general text emphasis - use Text or Badge instead.

class.description: Use class="sg-kbd" on a native <kbd> element.

parts.name: KbdGroup
parts.description: Groups multiple Kbd components together for displaying keyboard shortcuts with proper spacing.
parts.whenToUse: When displaying keyboard shortcuts that consist of multiple keys (e.g., Ctrl+K, Cmd+Shift+P).

class.description: Use class="sg-kbd-group" on a wrapper element (for example <span>).

examples.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
examples.code: Ctrl+S Save Cmd+K Command palette Esc Close

examples.title: Single Keys
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">A</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">B</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">C</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">D</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">Enter</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">Space</kbd>
    <kbd class="sg-kbd">Tab</kbd>
</sg-stack>
